description: 3 Pairs Girls Lace Socks Children Baby Cotton Ruffled Trim Ankle School Socks Fancy Princess Cute Partywear Socks. These Toddler socks are made of breathable cotton, which is warm and sweat-absorbing.These ruffled trim socks with eye-catching designs are ready to take you further in the race of looking beautiful at parties or any get together.These girls' socks are suitable for winter, spring, summer and autumn.These cute socks are elastic so you don't worry that the socks don't fit your girl's beautiful feet well. They are also easy to put on and take off. Premium quality cotton rich girls ankle socks with lace and cute bow trim design. They have a gentle elastic top edge & comfy toe seam. Ouch soft, breathable and stretchy. Easy to match Girls School socks with any clothes. These socks are perfect for most occasions. Ideal gift for school girls!
